recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity
recommendations.overview: After a young, middle-class couple moves into what seems like a typical suburban house, they become increasingly disturbed by a presence that may or may not be demonic but is certainly the most active in the middle of the night.
Two university students gain insight into life and love as they get to know each other during a road trip across Europe.

recommendations.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Horror, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: On Halloween night, two precocious little girls try to save their parents from their nasty old capitalist aunt's greedy clutches. Magic abounds and they meet mysterious new friends along the way.

recommendations.title: Guinea Pig Part 2: Flower of Flesh and Blood
recommendations.overview: A woman kidnapped in the dead of night awakens in a grisly dungeon, where her deranged assailant prepares her body for a morbid ritual.

recommendations.title: Night of the Living Deb
recommendations.overview: After a one night stand Deb wakes up in the middle of a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Girls with Balls
recommendations.overview: All girls volley ball team The Falcons end up stranded in the middle of nowhere after their mini-van breaks down. Little do they know they landed in degenerate hunters' territory and the hunt is on. Thus begins a very long night where they must run f

recommendations.title: Enter Nowhere
recommendations.overview: Three strangers arrive one by one to a mysterious cabin in the middle of nowhere after enduring separate life-altering predicaments. Searching for a way out of the woods, frustrated, hungry and battling to stay warm they discover their mysterious con

recommendations.title: The Nest
recommendations.overview: Samuel, a boy who lives with his mother Elena in Villa dei Laghi, an isolated manor surrounded by woods, feels trapped in the family routine, growing up seemingly protected, but unsatisfied and restless.

recommendations.title: The Return of the Texas Chainsaw Massacre
recommendations.overview: A group of teenagers get into a car crash in the Texas woods on prom night, and then wander into an old farmhouse that is home to Leatherface and his insane family of cannibalistic psychopaths.

recommendations.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
recommendations.overview: A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.
